description_long: This is a large, industrial snowplow vehicle with a robust, angular body painted in a rusty orange color, accented by metallic silver components. The front features a wide, heavy-duty plow blade designed for clearing snow, flanked by sturdy support arms and hydraulic mechanisms. The cab is boxy and reinforced, with multiple windows for visibility and a roof equipped with storage racks and equipment. The vehicle rides on continuous metal treads, providing excellent traction and stability on icy or snowy surfaces. Various external fixtures, such as antennas, exhaust pipes, and safety rails, are visible, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The overall construction is rugged, with thick panels and reinforced bumpers, suitable for harsh urban winter conditions.
description: A large, orange industrial snowplow with a reinforced cab, wide front plow blade, and metal treads for traction. The vehicle is heavily built with visible hydraulic arms and safety features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide plow blade, hydraulic arms, and reinforced cab with multiple windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the vehicle, metal treads, and external fixtures like exhaust pipes and storage racks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cab, storage racks on the roof, and the end of the treads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals additional details of the treads, side panels, and external equipment.
